## Source or dataset

What are you proposing?

## Origin

Where does it come from?

## Licensing / permissions

What allows this to be used here?

## What it improves

- Real-data module
- Synthetic-data explanation
- Source citation
- Provenance labeling
- Metric validation
- Other

## Expected impact

What becomes more accurate, more useful, or more trustworthy?

## Notes

Anything else the maintainers should know.
